dimensions.evidence: Plan required 5 named tests; diff delivers only TestScore_SupportedLanguage_StillWorks and TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected. TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA, TestScore_UnmeasuredComplexity_NotScored, and TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported are entirely absent (not even stubs). 2/5 = partial.
Only scorer_test.go touched, 70 lines added at end of file, no existing code modified, no other files changed — exactly as plan specified.

Both added tests assert real behavior using dynamic inputs (no hard-coded expected values). Minor deviation: TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses 'go' instead of the plan-specified TierGeneric unit, but the assertion logic itself is sound and not gamed.

Diff is test-only with no production changes or doc/code mismatches, but 3 of 5 planned regression guards are missing — leaving unsupported-language N/A, unmeasured-complexity, and aggregate-skip paths without test coverage, which is a concrete regression risk.

failureReasons: Only 2 of 5 required tests delivered — TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA, TestScore_UnmeasuredComplexity_NotScored, and TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported are completely missing from the diff.
Substantially incomplete: plan objective calls for comprehensive regression coverage across 5 test functions; only 40% implemented.
